details.description: A grand, white colonial-era hotel with a symmetrical three-storey facade and the words “RAFFLES HOTEL” on the central pediment. The building features arcaded verandahs with arched windows and shutters, cast-iron decorative columns supporting a covered porte-cochère, and a terracotta-tiled canopy at the entrance. Festive red wreaths and garlands decorate the upper balconies. A circular driveway with manicured hedges and parked cars sits in front, with tropical plantings and palms around the frontage. A flagpole with the Singapore flag tops the roof under a bright, partly cloudy sky.

details.description: A white colonial-era hotel facade dominates the scene: a three-story, symmetrical building with arched windows on the upper floors, decorative pediments, and a central triangular pediment bearing the sign RAFFLES HOTEL. The ground floor features a shaded porte-cochère supported by slender columns and a tiled entrance canopy. Red garlands or festive wreaths drape across the windows and along the facade, suggesting a holiday display. In front is a wide gravel driveway with a circular island of trimmed greenery and a few cars parked near the entrance. A clear blue sky with scattered clouds forms the backdrop, and a palm tree is visible on one side. Overall, the image captures the grand, white, neo-classical facade of the Raffles Hotel Singapore, evoking historical colonial luxury in a tropical city.

details.description: A daytime, eye-level photograph capturing the main façade of the iconic Raffles Hotel in Singapore. The building exhibits classic colonial architecture with a pristine white exterior, arched windows, rusticated columns, and a central pediment clearly displaying the text 'RAFFLES HOTEL'. The structure is adorned with festive Christmas decorations, including red and green wreaths and garlands draped along the second-floor balcony railing. A distinctive cast-iron porte-cochère with a tiled roof extends from the entrance, sheltering a few individuals standing near the doors. The foreground features a grey gravel driveway, typical of the hotel's entrance, with the front portion of a black vehicle visible on the left side. The sky above is a vibrant blue with scattered white cumulus clouds, and tall palm trees are visible on the right, framing the scene.

details.description: A low-angle, full-shot photograph of the iconic Raffles Hotel in Singapore. The grand, three-story white building is designed in a Neo-Renaissance colonial style, featuring symmetrical wings, arched windows, and a central portico. The facade is adorned with festive Christmas decorations, including large red and green wreaths and garlands draped across the upper balconies. The words 'RAFFLES HOTEL' are prominently displayed in black lettering on the central pediment and the side wing. A gravel driveway occupies the foreground, with a black car partially visible on the left. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds, and a flag flies from a pole atop the central roof.

details.description: Frontal view of the iconic white colonial-era luxury hotel with a symmetrical three-storey façade. The central pediment reads “RAFFLES HOTEL,” topped by a flagpole flying Singapore’s flag. Arched windows, colonnaded verandas, decorative balustrades and ironwork characterize the Neo‑Renaissance tropical style. Festive red garlands and wreaths decorate the balconies and porte‑cochère. A circular driveway with manicured hedges and parked cars leads to the covered entrance. Palm trees and lush landscaping frame the scene under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

entities.name: Raffles Hotel Singapore
entities.notes: Grand historic hotel opened 1887 by the Sarkies Brothers; main building completed 1899, designed by R.A.J. Bidwell of Swan & Maclaren. Declared a National Monument in 1987. Major restorations 1989–1991 and 2017–2019. Address: 1 Beach Road, Singapore.

details.description: Frontal view of the historic Raffles Hotel in Singapore. The three‑storey, white colonial facade is symmetrical with a central pediment labeled “RAFFLES HOTEL” and a flagpole flying the Singapore flag. Arched windows with shutters line the upper floors, and festive red garlands and wreaths decorate the arcades. The ground level features an ornate covered porte‑cochère with cast‑iron columns and a red‑tiled roof. In the foreground is a circular driveway bordered by manicured hedges and tropical landscaping, with cars at the drop‑off. Bright daytime sky with scattered clouds.

details.description: A grand white colonial-style hotel building with symmetrical wings and a central pediment, identified by the sign 'RAFFLES HOTEL' on the façade. The façade features numerous arched windows, decorative cornices, and a row of red garlands draped along the windows. A covered porte-cochère enters the building from a circular gravel driveway in the foreground. Several black cars are parked near the entrance. The scene is set under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, and a flagpole with a flag rises atop the central portion of the roof. Palm trees and manicured landscaping frame the scene on the right.

details.description: A daytime, eye-level photograph of the main facade of the iconic Raffles Hotel in Singapore. The building exhibits classic British colonial architecture with a pristine white stucco exterior, three stories of arched windows, and colonnaded verandas. The central pediment prominently displays the text "RAFFLES HOTEL" in black capital letters. The facade is decorated for the holiday season with large Christmas wreaths featuring red bows and poinsettias hanging between the columns on the second and third floors. A distinctive cast-iron porte-cochère with a terracotta tiled roof extends from the main entrance, sheltering a few standing figures. In the foreground, a grey gravel driveway circles a manicured island of green hedges and lawn. A black luxury van (resembling a Toyota Alphard) is partially visible on the left, and tall palm trees stand to the right. The sky is a vibrant blue with scattered fluffy white clouds.

details.description: A wide-angle, eye-level shot of the iconic Raffles Hotel in Singapore. The grand, three-story white building features classic colonial architecture with numerous arched windows, columns, and a central pediment bearing the name 'RAFFLES HOTEL'. The facade is festive, adorned with large red and green Christmas wreaths and garlands. A grey gravel driveway leads to a covered portico entrance where several people are visible. A black Toyota Alphard is parked in the foreground on the left. The scene is set under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds, and lush tropical greenery, including palm trees, frames the building.
